revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-545

Acronym: V.S.W.R.

In a transmission line or waveguide, the ratio of the amplitude of the transverse electric field at a plane of minimum strength to the amplitude at a corresponding point in an adjacent plane of maximum field strength.


Note: In some countries other than Britain, the reciprocal of this ratio is preferred.

Reference: B.S. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
